_comment: Seed terms for the periodic Omkar Etsy research job (scripts/etsy_opportunity_research_periodic.py). Each run pops a few terms off the front of this queue and researches them; on live-API failure (e.g. Omkar outage), terms are put back so nothing is lost. Separate from config/keyword_seed_queue.json (the eRank queue) so the two jobs don't compete over the same list. Add more terms to the end as it runs low.
queue: black and white frame tv art
